title: Mock Exam E
description: A 22-task RHCSA9 mock exam covering persistent networking, repositories, users, services, storage, NFS, SSH, and rootless containers across client and server.

tasks: On client, recover root access from the console and set the root password to cinder9.

On client, configure persistent IPv4 networking.

IP address: 192.168.122.44/24
Gateway: 192.168.122.1
DNS: 192.168.122.3
Hostname: client-e.exam9.lab
On client, configure enabled BaseOS and AppStream repositories from http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and http://server/repo/AppStream/ with GPG checks disabled.
On client, install lsof from the configured repositories and remove dos2unix if it is installed.
On client, create group opse9. Create users anae9, deve9, and audite9; audite9 must use /sbin/nologin. Set each password to cinder9 and add anae9 and deve9 to opse9.
On client, set maximum password age 60 days and warning period 7 days for anae9. Allow members of opse9 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
On client, create shared drop directory /srv/drop-e9 owned by root:opse9 with setgid and sticky bits enabled and permissions 3770.
On client, create executable script /usr/local/bin/report-e9 that writes ember frost report and the active state of sshd, chronyd, and firewalld to /root/report-e9.txt.
On client, create a 512 MiB swap file at /swape9, activate it immediately, and make it persistent.
On client, create volume group vge9 on /dev/sdb, create logical volume datae9 with size 320 MiB, format it as XFS, and mount it persistently at /mnt/datae9.
On client, create user pode9, enable lingering for that user, and run a rootless container named webe9 from localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest.

On server, configure persistent IPv4 networking.

IP address: 192.168.122.3/24
Gateway: 192.168.122.1
DNS: 192.168.122.3
Hostname: server-e.exam9.lab
On server, configure enabled BaseOS and AppStream repositories from http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and http://server/repo/AppStream/ with GPG checks disabled.
On server, create group srve9, create user svce9 with password cinder9, add svce9 to srve9, and allow srve9 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
On server, publish /var/www/html/exam-e.html containing ember service web, configure httpd to listen on TCP port 8304, label the port for httpd, and open it permanently in firewalld.
On server, enable persistent systemd journal storage and restart systemd-journald.
On server, schedule a root cron job that runs every 9 minutes and appends ember audit cron to /var/log/audite9.log.
On server, set the default boot target to multi-user.target and create /srv/server-e9 owned by root:srve9 with permissions 2770.
On server, export /exports/rhcsa9-e to 192.168.122.0/24 with a README containing ember depot export. On client, mount server:/exports/rhcsa9-e persistently at /mnt/rhcsa9-e.
On server, create user copye9 with password cinder9. On client, configure key-based SSH login for root to copye9@server.
On client, create /root/exam-e-copy.txt containing ember vault transfer and copy it to server:/home/copye9/exam-e-copy.txt.
On server, enable chronyd for the lab network. On client, configure chronyd to use server as its only time source.
solution_commands: # At the boot menu, edit the selected kernel entry.
# Append rw init=/bin/bash to the linux line and boot with Ctrl+x.
nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.44/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
for service in sshd chronyd firewalld; do
nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.3/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
checks: echo cinder9 | su - root -c 'whoami' 2>/dev/null | grep -qx root

hostnamectl --static | grep -qx client-e.exam9.lab && CONN="System eth1"; nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.44/24 && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.1 && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fq 192.168.122.3

test -f /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '^baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/?$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '^baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/?$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && [ "$(grep -Ec '^enabled=1$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ] && [ "$(grep -Ec '^gpgcheck=0$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ]
rpm -q lsof >/dev/null

getent group opse9 >/dev/null && id -nG anae9 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opse9 && id -nG deve9 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opse9 && getent passwd audite9 | awk -F: '$7 == "/sbin/nologin" {found=1} END {exit !found}'

chage -l anae9 | grep -Eq 'Maximum.*60' && chage -l anae9 | grep -Eq 'warning.*7' && grep -Eq '^%opse9[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$' /etc/sudoers.d/opse9-systemctl
stat -c '%U:%G:%a' /srv/drop-e9 | grep -qx root:opse9:3770
test -x /usr/local/bin/report-e9 && /usr/local/bin/report-e9 >/dev/null && grep -Fxq 'ember frost report' /root/report-e9.txt
swapon --show=NAME --noheadings | grep -qx '/swape9' && awk '$1 == "/swape9" && $2 == "swap" && $3 == "swap" {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
lvs /dev/vge9/datae9 >/dev/null 2>&1 && findmnt -no TARGET /mnt/datae9 | grep -qx /mnt/datae9 && awk '$2 == "/mnt/datae9" && $3 == "xfs" {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
runuser -l pode9 -c 'podman ps --format {{.Names}}' | grep -qx webe9 && loginctl show-user pode9 | grep -Eq '^Linger=yes$'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; hostnamectl --static | grep -qx server-e.exam9.lab && CONN="System eth1"; nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.3/24 && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.1 && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fq 192.168.122.3'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; test -f /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '"'"'^baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/?$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '"'"'^baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/?$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && [ "$(grep -Ec '"'"'^enabled=1$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ] && [ "$(grep -Ec '"'"'^gpgcheck=0$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ]'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; getent group srve9 >/dev/null && id -nG svce9 | tr '"'"' '"'"' '"'"'\n'"'"' | grep -qx srve9 && grep -Eq '"'"'^%srve9[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$'"'"' /etc/sudoers.d/srve9-systemctl'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq '"'"'ember service web'"'"' /var/www/html/exam-e.html && grep -Eq '"'"'^Listen[[:space:]]+8304$'"'"' /etc/httpd/conf.d/exam-e.conf && semanage port -l | awk '"'"'$1 == "http_port_t" && $2 == "tcp" && $0 ~ /(^|[ ,])8304([, ]|$)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' && firewall-cmd --permanent --query-port=8304/tcp && systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; files=""; test -d /var/log/journal && systemctl is-active systemd-journald | grep -qx active && files=$(find /etc/systemd -maxdepth 2 \( -path /etc/systemd/journald.conf -o -path '"'"'/etc/systemd/journald.conf.d/*.conf'"'"' \) -type f 2>/dev/null); test -n "$files" && awk '"'"'FNR == 1 {in_journal=0} /^[[:space:]]*\[Journal\][[:space:]]*($|#)/ {in_journal=1; next} /^[[:space:]]*\[/ {in_journal=0} in_journal && /^[[:space:]]*Storage[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*persistent[[:space:]]*($|#)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' $files'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; test -x /usr/local/sbin/audite9.sh && grep -Fxq '"'"'*/9 * * * * root /usr/local/sbin/audite9.sh'"'"' /etc/cron.d/audite9 && grep -Fxq "echo '"'"'ember audit cron'"'"' >> /var/log/audite9.log" /usr/local/sbin/audite9.sh && systemctl is-enabled crond | grep -qx enabled'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl get-default | grep -qx multi-user.target && stat -c '"'"'%U:%G:%a'"'"' /srv/server-e9 | grep -qx root:srve9:2770'

findmnt -no SOURCE,TARGET /mnt/rhcsa9-e | grep -qx 'server:/exports/rhcsa9-e /mnt/rhcsa9-e' && grep -Eq '^server:/exports/rhcsa9-e[[:space:]]+/mnt/rhcsa9-e[[:space:]]+nfs([[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq "ember depot export" /exports/rhcsa9-e/README && grep -Eq "^/exports/rhcsa9-e[[:space:]]+192\\.168\\.122\\.0/24" /etc/exports.d/rhcsa9-e.exports && systemctl is-active nfs-server | grep -qx active'
runuser -l root -c 'ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o NumberOfPasswordPrompts=0 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null copye9@server true'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq '"'"'ember vault transfer'"'"' /home/copye9/exam-e-copy.txt'

grep -Eq '^server[[:space:]]+server[[:space:]]+iburst$' /etc/chrony.conf && systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active chronyd | grep -qx active'
